name: Sikri Holding AS
summary: Sikri Holding AS provides case processing, and document management and archiving solutions to the public sector in Norway. Its products include Elements Sak-Arkiv, a case archive system for the management of public services; Elements eByggesak, a case management tool specially adapted for construction case processing; and Elements RiskManager, an electronic quality system that supports the business with quality and management processes, non-conformance management, notifications, and risk assessments for both the public and private sectors. The company's products also comprise Elements Cloud that supports external login, as well as integrates login solutions in the market, such as ADFS and SAML-based identity solutions; and Elements Lekdommer, a web-based solution for municipalities in connection with the election, updating, and exemption treatment of co-judges in the district court and co-judges and storage members in the storage court. In addition, it offers courses and training, consulting, and support, as well as provides personal counseling of key resources. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Lysaker, Norway.
